disableBackground.name: Disable Moving Background
disableBackground.description: Disable moving background in **all Rated Layouts Layer and Pages**. <cy>Enable this setting if you experience performance issues.</cy>

rgbBackground.name: Background Color
rgbBackground.description: Customize the background color of the **Main Page**, **Custom Search**, and **Leaderboard**

backgroundType.name: Background Type
backgroundType.description: Change the custom moving background in the Rated Layouts page. <cy>Numbers are based off the order shown in the background selection in editor.</cy>

disableNewRate.name: Disable Notification
disableNewRate.description: Disables notification that appears when a new rated/event layout occured.

disableNewRateInLevel.name: Disable Notification in Level
disableNewRateInLevel.description: Disables the notification that appears when a new rated/event layout occurred while you are in a level. <cy>Enable this if you find the notification distracting while playing.</cy>

notiScale.name: Notification Scale
notiScale.description: Set the scale of the newly rated/event layout notification. <cy>Minimum is 0.1, and Maximum is 1.0.</cy>

pollingInterval.name: Polling Interval (Seconds)
pollingInterval.description: Set the polling interval for checking newly rated/event layouts. <cy>Minimum is 1 second.</cy>

removeSeconds.name: Remove Notification After (Seconds)
removeSeconds.description: Set the time duration for how long the newly rated/event layout notification stays on screen. <cy>Minimum is 1 second.</cy>

disableNameplate.name: Disable Nameplate in Leaderboard
disableNameplate.description: Disable nameplate in Rated Layouts leaderboards.

disableRLMenu.name: Disable Stats Menu Button
disableRLMenu.description: Disable the Rated Layouts stats menu button in the Profile Page.

disableMenuAnimation.name: Disable Stats Menu Animation
disableMenuAnimation.description: Disable the animation when you open the Rated Layouts Stats Menu.

disableRewardAnimation.name: Disable Reward Animation
disableRewardAnimation.description: Disable the reward animation when you complete a rated layout level <cy>Enable this if you kept crashing from the reward animation</cy>

disableParticles.name: Disable Title Particles
disableParticles.description: Disables particle effects in Legendary+ Rated Layouts Level Name Title. <cy>Enable this setting if you experience performance issues.</cy>

disableCommentGlow.name: Disable Comment Glow
disableCommentGlow.description: Disables the blue glow effect on comments made by users using <cl>Rated Layouts mod</cl>

disableCommentGlowNameplate.name: Disable Comment Glow on Nameplate
disableCommentGlowNameplate.description: Disable comment glow effect if the user has a nameplate applied. <cy>Enabled by default</c>

disableMenuButton.name: Disable Rated Layouts Menu Button
disableMenuButton.description: Disable the Rated Layouts Menu Button in the Main Menu. <cy>Enable this if you don't use the Rated Layouts Menu and want a cleaner Main Menu.</cy>

disableScrollbar.name: Disable Scrollbar
disableScrollbar.description: Disable the scrollbar in Rated Layouts leaderboards and level browser.

disableCreatorPoints.name: Disable Blueprint Points
disableCreatorPoints.description: Disable all related to Blueprint Points. <co>This is those who doesn't want to see blueprint points entirely as they see it as a competition.</c> <cr>Although this won't entirely remove it, it just gives a sense that it is.</c>

disableCreatorPointsToggle.name: Disable Blueprint Points Toggle
disableCreatorPointsToggle.description: Disable the toggler to show/hide blueprint points of creators who has interacted with the mod. <cy>By default it will always show the top creators regardless if that creator has used this mod or not.</c>

disableModInfo.name: Disable Mod Info
disableModInfo.description: Disables the mod info shown in the Rated Layouts Creator Layer.

requestCacheLifetime.name: Request Cache Lifetime (Seconds)
requestCacheLifetime.description: Keep comment role and level rating fetch results cached for this many seconds. <cy>Lower values refresh more often.</c>

requestCacheMaxItems.name: Request Cache Max Items
requestCacheMaxItems.description: Limit how many comment role and level rating cache entries are stored in memory. <cy>Set to 0 for unlimited.</c>

clearRequestCache.name: Clear Request Cache
clearRequestCache.description: Clears the comment role and level rating cache stored by Rated Layouts.
